name: bio-skills
description: Agent skills for the bioinformatics research-engineering chores that have no tool and need judgement. Pipeline skills: pipeline-triage (diagnose a failed run, draft the fix) and methods-writer (Methods section + reproducibility record). Repo-hygiene skills: repo-scaffold (scripts-only new repo) and commit-guard (pre-push data/secret/PII check). All propose, never execute.
